creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
You're both partially correct :)

 * Python ports must be prefixed with py- unless there is a compelling case not to do so.
 * Python ports must be named py-<[upstream|pypi]name] unless there is a compelling case not to do so.

Please rename the port (and svn directory) to py-pyscard. PORTNAME should be upstream name, with PKGNAMEPREFIX set to PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX.
